languages.text: "Ну что ж, как говорят у нас в полку — на здоровье". {n}Батошски следит, как вы опрокидываете содержимое кружки в горло.{/n}
"Well, as we say in our regiment, to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you tip the contents of the cup down your throat.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Ну что ж, как говорят у нас в полку — на здоровье". {n}Батошски следит, как вы опрокидываете содержимое кружки в горло.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Well, as we say in our regimen, to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you tip the contents of the cup down your throat.{/n}
"Well, as we say in our regiment to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you tip the contents of the cup down your throat.{/n}

"Well, as we say in our regiment, to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you tip the contents of the cup down your throat.{/n}

languages.text: 「さて、メロフ流に言えば――ご健康を」{n}バトシュスキーは、あなたが椀を手に取り、その中身を喉に流し込むのを見守っている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, as they say on Merov, to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you take the bowl and tip its contents down your throat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「さて、メロフ流に言えば――ご健康を。」{n}バトシュスキーは、あなたが椀を手に取り、その中身を喉に流し込むのを見守っている。{/n}

languages.text: « Eh bien, comme on dit dans notre régiment, à votre santé. » {n}Batoshski vous regarde incliner la coupe et verser son contenu dans votre bouche.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, as we say in our regiment, to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you tip the contents of the cup down your throat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Eh bien, comme on dit dans notre régiment, à votre santé. » {n}Batoshski vous regarde incliner la coupe et verser son contenu dans votre bouche.{/n}

languages.text: "Merov alayında sağlığınıza deriz." {n}Batoshski, bardağı alıp içindekileri boğazından aşağı boşaltmanı izliyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, as we say in our regiment, to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you tip the contents of the cup down your throat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Merov alayında sağlığınıza deriz." {n}Batoshski, bardağı alıp içindekileri boğazından aşağı boşaltmanı izliyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Bueno, como se dice en nuestro regimiento, a su buena salud». {n}Batoshski te observa mientras apuras la taza y su contenido desciende por tu garganta.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, as we say in our regiment, to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you tip the contents of the cup down your throat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Bueno, como se dice en nuestro regimiento, a su buena salud». {n}Batoshski te observa mientras apuras la taza y su contenido desciende por tu garganta.{/n}

languages.text: “好吧，那就按我们军团的说法，祝您健康。”{n}巴托什斯基看着你将杯中的东西灌进喉咙。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, as we say in our regiment, to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you tip the contents of the cup down your throat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “好吧，那就按我们军团的说法，祝您健康。”{n}巴托什斯基看着你将杯中的东西灌进喉咙。{/n}

languages.text: "Tja, wie wir in unserem Regiment sagen ... auf Euer Wohl." {n}Batoshski lässt dich nicht aus den Augen, während du den Becher leerst.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, as we say in our regiment, to your good health." {n}Batoshski watches as you tip the contents of the cup down your throat.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Tja, wie wir in unserem Regiment sagen ... auf Euer Wohl." {n}Batoshski lässt dich nicht aus den Augen, während du den Becher leerst.{/n}
